untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'block shopping activity by brokers' and 'order flow acceleration' — these are real-time market microstructure events that cannot be reliably encoded using only OHLCV and standard technical indicators. Broker order inquiry frequency, block order detection, and bid-ask spread changes are not available in the allowed indicator set. Position entry should be triggered by external market data feeds or broker API signals, not backward-looking price/volume data.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using volume anomalies and directional price confirmation as proxies for block shopping detection, but this significantly misrepresents the signal's intent. The core mechanism (detecting and front-running block orders via broker shopping) requires real-time order book and broker communication data unavailable in standard backtesting engines. Manual review and external data integration required.
